name: garimpo-ia
description: Garimpo IA™ — O Bloomberg Terminal dos Leilões Brasileiros. Plataforma SaaS de inteligência em ativos físicos.

scripts.audit:colors: echo '--- AUDIT: Zero Hardcoded Colors ---' && grep -rn '#[0-9a-fA-F]\{3,8\}' src/ --include='*.tsx' --include='*.ts' | grep -v 'theme.css' | grep -v '.config' || echo '✅ PASS: Zero hex hardcoded'
scripts.audit:mocks: echo '--- AUDIT: Zero Mock Data ---' && grep -rn 'mock\|Mock\|fake\|Fake\|placeholder\|Placeholder\|dummy\|lorem' src/ --include='*.tsx' --include='*.ts' | grep -v 'test' | grep -v 'spec' || echo '✅ PASS: Zero mock data'
scripts.audit:tailwind: echo '--- AUDIT: Zero Hardcoded Tailwind Colors ---' && grep -rn 'bg-white\|bg-black\|bg-gray-\|text-white\|text-black\|text-gray-' src/ --include='*.tsx' --include='*.ts' || echo '✅ PASS: Zero hardcoded Tailwind'
scripts.audit:full: npm run audit:colors && npm run audit:mocks && npm run audit:tailwind && npm run build
